title: Workaround to assign people column via subitem in monday form
excerpt:
I am looking for a solution to be able to assign people to subitem in form 
is there any way / workaround?

posts.author: rivkam (Rivka)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am looking for a solution to be able to assign people to subitem in form
is there any way / workaround?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Are they also filling out the form for the ‘parent item’?

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Rivka:

I am looking for a solution to be able to assign people to subitem in form
is there any way / workaround?

Currently, monday.com forms do not natively support assigning people to subitems directly through the form interface. However, there are a couple of workarounds you can use to achieve similar functionality:

Workaround 1: Use a Dropdown or Status Column + Automation

  1. Add a dropdown or status column to your form with the names of team members.
  2. Set up an automation that says:
  • “When status changes to [Person A], assign [Person A] to the subitem.”
  1. This requires one automation per person, and you’ll need to update the automation if your team changes

Workaround 2: Assign People to Subitems Based on Parent Item

If you’re assigning people to the parent item via the form, you can use an app like Subitems Pro Automations to automatically assign the same person (or role-based assignments) to the subitems

Workaround 3: Use VLOOKUP Auto-link App

Some users have used the VLOOKUP Auto-link app to auto-assign people based on form inputs, though this is more advanced and may require a paid plan or integration

Summary:

Feature Native Support Workaround
Assign people to subitems via form Dropdown + automation
Assign people to parent item via form —
Auto-assign subitem based on parent (native) With Subitems Pro Automations

Would you like help setting up one of these automations or exploring the Subitems Pro app? Let me know with a like if this helped or reach back out
